title: carex divulsa var. virens
intro: Carex divulsa var. virens, also known as green sedge, is a variety of sedge plant that belongs to the Carex family and is native to Europe and western Asia. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The green sedge plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Green sedge is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or salve form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
